description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent hip roof and a detached garage at the front. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, several mature trees, and features a backyard with a swimming pool, a swing set, and a small tent or playhouse. The main structure has large windows, a central chimney, and a covered patio area at the rear, partially enclosed with glass or transparent panels. The entryway is marked by a small porch with steps leading up to the front door, flanked by columns and sheltered by an overhang. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional family amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, detached garage, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, detached garage, driveway, and two large trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, swing set, tent/playhouse, and the covered patio area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full width of the house, glass-enclosed patio, pool, and swing set, with more trees visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the tall chimney, side windows, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, columns, and an overhanging roof
